note: Submodule of select2. Marks referenced entities in a Select2 widget with their published status via two hooks and an asset library; no configuration. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded); no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want editors to see which referenced entities are unpublished directly in a Select2 entity reference dropdown. Which module provides this and how much configuration does it need?
evals.expected_output: The Select2 Publish (select2_publish) submodule; it needs no configuration — enable it and Select2 entity reference widgets gain published/unpublished indicators.

evals.prompt: Which modules does Select2 Publish depend on, and why does it need form_options_attributes?
evals.expected_output: It depends on select2 and form_options_attributes; form_options_attributes renders the data-published attribute onto each <option> element.

evals.prompt: How does Select2 Publish flag published status on lazily-loaded (autocomplete/AJAX) Select2 suggestions?
evals.expected_output: It implements hook_select2_autocomplete_matches_alter() to add a `published` flag to each autocomplete match returned by the Select2 matcher.

evals.prompt: How does Select2 Publish add the published status to rendered (non-AJAX) Select2 options?
evals.expected_output: Via hook_element_info_alter() it adds a StatusProperties::preRender pre-render callback to the select2 element that sets #options_attributes[...]['data-published'] on each option.

evals.prompt: Which referenced entity types does Select2 Publish decorate with status indicators?
evals.expected_output: Only entity types whose class implements EntityPublishedInterface (publishable entity types); others are left untouched.

evals.prompt: What styles the unpublished options differently in the Select2 dropdown once Select2 Publish is enabled?
evals.expected_output: The select2_publish/select2.publish asset library (CSS + JS) attached automatically by the pre-render, consuming the data-published attributes.
